---
title: "Race"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
date: "2026-06-12"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Packages

```{r}
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(DataExplorer)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

# Race Dataset

```{r}
race <- read_parquet("C:/Users/alyss/Documents/GitHub/intox_agro/resultados/contextual/pop_raca_cor_sp_2022.parquet")

```

## Clean

```{r}

plot_missing(race)

race_sp <- race %>%
  filter(Codigo >= 350000 & Codigo < 360000)


library(dplyr)

race_sp <- race_sp %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(Branca, Preta, Amarela, Parda, Indígena),
      ~ as.numeric(.)))
```

### Missingness

```{r}
race_sp |>   
  filter(is.na(Branca)) |>
  select(Codigo, Branca)

race_sp |>   
  filter(is.na(Amarela)) |>   
  select(Codigo, Amarela)  

race_sp |>   
  filter(is.na(Preta)) |>   
  select(Codigo, Preta)  

race_sp |>   
  filter(is.na(Indígena)) |>   
  select(Codigo, Indígena)
```

Indígena: missing for 73 municipalities

Amarela: missing for 2 municipalities

Preta: no missing

Branca: no missing

## Raw Distribution

```{r}

#create quartiles
race_sp <- race_sp %>%
  mutate(
    Branca_Q   = ntile(desc(Branca), 4),
    Preta_Q    = ntile(desc(Preta), 4),
    Amarela_Q  = ntile(desc(Amarela), 4),
    Parda_Q    = ntile(desc(Parda), 4),
    Indigena_Q = ntile(desc(`Indígena`), 4)
  )

#table 1
race_long <- race_sp %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Branca, Preta, Amarela, Parda, `Indígena`),
    names_to = "Race",
    values_to = "Percent"
  ) %>%
  group_by(Race) %>%
  mutate(
    Quartile = ntile(desc(Percent), 4)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Race, Quartile) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    Mean = mean(Percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(Percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    Min = min(Percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    Max = max(Percent, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

race_long
```

### Distribution Grouping Race

```{r}
race_sp <- race_sp %>%
  mutate(
    Other = Amarela + Indígena + Preta)
```

```{r}
race_vars <- c("Branca", "Parda", "Other")

quartile_summary <- map_dfr(race_vars, function(var) {
  
  race_sp %>%
    select(all_of(var)) %>%
    rename(value = all_of(var)) %>%
    mutate(
      Quartile = ntile(desc(value), 4)
    ) %>%
    group_by(Quartile) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      pct = round(100 * n() / nrow(race_sp), 1),
      median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
      min = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
      max = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      Race = var,
      Range = paste0(round(min, 1), "–", round(max, 1))
    ) %>%
    select(Race, Quartile, n, pct, median, Range)
})

quartile_summary
```

## Neat Table

```{r}
quartile_summary %>%
  kable(
    digits = 1,
    caption = "Distribution of Municipalities by Race Quartile",
    col.names = c(
      "Race",
      "Quartile",
      "n",
      "%",
      "Median (%)",
      "Range"
    )
  ) %>%
  collapse_rows(columns = 1) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

## Normality

```{r}

race_vars <- c("Branca", "Parda", "Other")


race_sp %>%
  select(all_of(race_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "race",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20) +
  facet_wrap(~ race, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal()
```
